Petition For Removal Of Successor Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-18-2015 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Removal Of Successor Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shaun Carberry for and with (beneficiary & co-trustee) Edward Hong. (Co-Trustee) Daniel Hong also present.

The court noted that 3 of the co-trustees are in favor of the proposed plan and that there has been no response or objection filed by the 4th co-trustee. Mr. Carberry stated that John (co-trustee)is incommunicado, does not respond at all, that he has not objected and that he is estranged from the family. The court asked if the successor trustees automatically became co-trustees, is there a vacancy that needs to be filled, does it require a petition and stated that there is no petition to remove John. Mr. Carberry stated that he can file a petition for removal. The petition for appointment of successor trustee was taken off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago. (Not Reported)
